title: Appointment Confirmation + Reminder
summary: Automates appointment confirmations and reacts differently to confirm, reschedule, or unclear replies.
businessOutcome: Reduce no-shows and remove manual confirmation work while keeping clients engaged.
thumbnail: Scheduled appointments trigger smart reply handling.
problem: Appointment teams lose time confirming bookings manually and can miss reschedule intent hidden in email replies.
solution: This workflow sends confirmation emails, waits for a response, then branches into confirm, reschedule, or follow-up actions based on the client's reply.
workflowOverview: Sends a confirmation request after appointment creation
Updates status or routes into a reschedule path automatically
